svg.text: AI-driven CRM & Sales Platform · NestJS · Multi-channel · LLM Orchestration

g.text: Auth (Better-Auth) · RBAC · Rate Limit · Audit Log · Multi-tenant
Intent Router · Specialized Agents · Tool Registry (MCP)
Classify intent → dispatch agent · Powered by Gemini Flash
Cloud LLMs · All requests pass through PII Masking
Microsoft Presidio + VN rules · Mask before cloud LLM calls
Ingest from sources · Normalize · Resolve · Detect conflicts · Embed
External systems · Read-mostly · Owners of source-of-truth records
Knowledge Graph — core IP, single source of customer truth
PII Masking — mandatory before any cloud LLM call
Redis Streams — backbone of sync pipeline
DLQ — alert + manual replay on persistent failure
STACK PILLARS (FREE / SELF-HOST · Paid LLM only)
① Modular monolith — reuse mia-chatbot stack (NestJS · 11 domain modules · Turborepo)
② PII-first — every prompt passes through Presidio + VN rules before cloud LLM calls (Gemini Paid plan, no training on data)
③ Layered source-of-truth — SAP/Haravan/KiotViet are raw; Knowledge Graph is the single semantic view; conflict detector reconciles
④ Resilient sync — Redis Streams + retry + DLQ; webhook idempotent + HMAC; cron watermark
⑤ Cost-aware LLM — Flash for router/P3; Pro for P1/P2; Claude as fallback
⑥ Observable — Langfuse traces every LLM call (cost · latency · tool use)
